query:
SELECT e.id, e.nomeCompleto, e.status as empStatus, vp.id as vpId, vp.status as feriaStatus, vp.dataInicio, vp.dataFim 
FROM employees e 
LEFT JOIN vacation_periods vp ON vp.employeeId = e.id AND vp.status = 'em_gozo' AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%MATEUS OLIVEIRA%' AND e.deletedAt IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT e.id, e.nomeCompleto, e.status as empStatus, vp.id as vpId, vp.status as feriaStatus, vp.dataInicio, vp.dataFim 
FROM employees e 
LEFT JOIN vacation_periods vp ON vp.employeeId = e.id AND vp.status = 'em_gozo' AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%MATEUS OLIVEIRA%' AND e.deletedAt IS NULL;
